js:
function toggleTheme() { document.body.classList.toggle('light'); document.querySelector('.theme-btn').textContent = document.body.classList.contains('light') ? '🌞' : '🌙'; }
function subscribe() { const input = document.querySelector('.nl-form input'); const btn = document.querySelector('.nl-form button'); if (input.value.includes('@')) { btn.textContent = '✓ Kaydedildi!'; btn.style.background = '#22c55e'; input.value = ''; setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Abone Ol'; btn.style.background = '#a855f7'; }, 3000); } else { input.style.borderColor = '#ef4444'; setTimeout(() => input.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', 2000); } }
